description_long: A young adult stands upright, dressed in a coordinated outfit featuring a loose, long-sleeved top and matching pants, both adorned with traditional motifs and a wide sash tied at the waist. The figure's attire is accessorized with a thick rope belt and a decorative ribbon hanging from the waist, adding a sense of cultural or ceremonial significance. The individual has a short, straight bob haircut, and a prominent horned headpiece or mask is worn on the left side of the head, giving a striking and unique appearance. The footwear consists of open-toed sandals with ankle wraps, suitable for urban or street environments. The hands are relaxed at the sides, and the overall build is slender and athletic. The back of the outfit features a large, stylized animal graphic, further emphasizing the character's distinctive style.
description: A slender adult in traditional, coordinated attire with a horned headpiece, rope belt, and open-toed sandals, standing upright. The outfit features cultural motifs and a large animal graphic on the back.
description_view_0: Front view shows the horned headpiece, rope belt, decorative ribbon, and the open neckline of the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the horned headpiece and the layered effect of the sash and belt.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the large animal graphic on the back of the top and the full length of the decorative ribbon.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the side profile of the headpiece and the relaxed posture of the arms.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional loose top and pants with a wide sash, rope belt, and decorative ribbon, accessorized with a horned headpiece
